I didn't like how they spoke to the tourists; the beachgoers were very rude.

reviews.comment:
PESIMA ATENCION, LA ESTRELLA FUE PARA PODER OPINAR . MAS DE MEDIA HORA ESPERANDO MIENTRAS LOS EMPLEADOS ESTAN ADENTRO CHARLANDO. UNA VERGÜENZA

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. The star was given so I could give my opinion. We waited for over half an hour while the employees were inside chatting. A disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNaX0stMnJ3RRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Excellent location, service, and cleanliness; I always visit it when I go to Miranar 👍👍

reviews.comment:
Fui auxilado por un agente del ACA  de Miramar. He quedando sorprendido por la exelente y profesional trabajo para eslingar una moto que me dejo a la vera de la ruta y mi reconacimiento a ese trabajador.

(Translated by Google)
I was assisted by an ACA agent from Miramar. I was amazed by the excellent and professional work he did in towing my motorcycle, which had left me stranded on the side of the road, and I want to express my gratitude to that worker.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwdTdfMU5REAE
